contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: agroverse_shop partner header rotation + tribomirimbahia ledger doc alignment + Stripe-integration research
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/104
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia/pull/5
  
  Details:
  Cluster of small but real-impact items since the last contribution log:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta#104 — Fix upside-down
     black-king-ilheus-header.jpg. Gary spotted that the live partner
     header at beta.agroverse.shop was rendering inverted. Rotated the
     JPG 180° in place via sips. The HEIC sibling source is also
     upside-down but sips' HEIC encoder errored (AVEBridge -12908); left
     for a follow-up since only the JPG is served. Prod sync to
     agroverse_shop_prod still needed.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia#5 — Align docs with actual deployed
     ledger (TBM) + CNAME (tribomirimbahia.truesight.me). Gary asked
     whether tribomirimbahia.truesight.me was linked to its proper
     ledger. Investigation: linkage works correctly — LEDGER_ID = 'TBM'
     fetches managed-ledgers/TBM.json from treasury-cache, 200 OK, valid
     schema, empty transactions show "Ledger Coming Soon" by design.
     But docs lagged behind reality. Updated AGENT_BRIEF.md,
     CLAUDE_PROMPT_LEDGER.md, README.md to use the actual ledger name
     (TBM, not "tribomirimbahia") and current CNAME
     (tribomirimbahia.truesight.me, not "mirim-bahia"). Recovery story:
     first push attempt accidentally pulled in 181 MB of leftover Phase
     1A compiled_clips/*.mp4 via git add -A; killed the push mid-flight,
     reset the local commit, re-staged only the 3 doc files, re-pushed
     clean.
  
  3. Research time for upcoming Stripe integration discussion: read all
     recent Stripe-flow docs landed in agentic_ai_context (Stripe →
     Ledger routing flow, [LEDGER_ID] bracketed pattern, doGet/Sidekiq
     trigger pattern, 4 documented Stripe flows). Read
     sentiment_importer webhook_controller#stripe + meta_checkout_controller
     to understand the existing checkout.session.completed →
     MetaCheckoutOrderSyncWorker → StripeCheckoutLog ledger routing path.
     Discussion with Gary about subdomain naming (tbm vs tribomirimbahia)
     and Google Sheet URL vs treasury-cache as data source — both
     resolved without changes (donor-facing readability wins for the
     subdomain; treasury-cache audit trail wins over direct Sheet URL).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
